name: eor-compliance-mcp
title: EOR Compliance MCP — Global Hiring for AI Agents
description: MCP server for AI agents handling EOR & global hiring conversations. 8 tools: country EOR briefs, misclassification risk analysis, EOR vs entity break-even calculator, termination rules, statutory benefits, work visa paths, objection handlers. Covers UK, IE, ES, DE, FR, NL, Nordics, Mexico, Brazil, India, Japan, Singapore. By Elisabeth Hitz - 3+ yrs EOR at Deel, Multiplier.
seoTitle: EOR Compliance MCP for AI Agents | Global Hiring Intelligence
seoDescription: MCP server for AI sales agents selling Employer-of-Record solutions. Country-specific compliance, misclassification risk, EOR vs entity calculator. Built from 3+ yrs at Deel, Multiplier.
